creator: billf@chc-chimes.com
text:
Duncan,

In September you said that a new release of TkDesk was coming out that
would obsolete this PR.

I checked the homepage for TkDesk and found a new version has been
released. Would you please submit a PR updating this port, both to keep
our tree current and to fix the Y2K bug as well.

Thanks,

- bill fumerola - billf@chc-chimes.com - BF1560 - computer horizons corp -
- ph:(800) 252-2421 - bfumerol@computerhorizons.com - billf@FreeBSD.org  -
